canonical_name: RNA component of mitochondrial RNA processing
step_rationale: Circulating ncRNA with high discriminatory power for ACS subtypes.
mechanism: RMRP is a circulating non-coding RNA that discriminates acute MI subtypes and detects acute myocardial injury in coronary syndromes.

references.title: Discriminatory power of a circulating multi-noncoding RNA panel in acute coronary syndrome subtypes: Towards precision detection.
references.journal: The international journal of biochemistry & cell biology
